meta.title: G·Artisans — Sustainable Artisan Marketplace Made in Europe
meta.description: Join G·Artisans, the reference platform for sustainable producers and European artisans. Reach buyers who value authentic, handmade products.

hero.headline: Your craft, in the marketplace it deserves.
hero.subheadline: G·Artisans connects European sustainable producers with buyers who value authentic, handmade goods.

meta.title: Join as a founding producer — G·Artisans
meta.description: Apply for your spot as one of G·Artisans' 50 founding producers. Limited spots available.

hero.title: Join G·Artisans as a founding producer
hero.description: We have 50 limited spots for sustainable European producers. Tell us about your craft and why you should be here.

form.title: Producer Application
form.description: Complete the form with your business information. We review every application personally.

meta.title: Application Submitted — G·Artisans
meta.description: Your application has been received. We'll be in touch soon.

success.title: Application received!
success.description: Thank you for your interest in G·Artisans. We have received your application and will contact you within a few days.

nextSteps.title: Next steps
nextSteps.step2: We'll send you a confirmation email
nextSteps.step3: If you're selected, we'll call you to discuss next steps

label.craftDescription: What do you make? Tell us about your craft
label.referral: How did you hear about us? (optional)

placeholder.craftDescription: Tell us about your craft, your products and what makes you special...
placeholder.referral: How did you hear about us?

errors.title: Error
errors.serverError: An error occurred while submitting your application. Please try again or email us at support@g-artisans.com
errors.rateLimit: You have sent too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again or email us at hola@g-artisans.com
errors.rateLimit: Too many requests. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

footer.copyright: © 2026 G·Artisans · Alternative Green Energy Holdco S.L.

producerShowcase.title: Featured Artisans
producerShowcase.description: Meet the sustainable producers who are part of G·Artisans.
producerShowcase.noProducers: No producers available at the moment.
